sourceOfTruth.policy: Use only the latest archive downloaded directly from the active GitHub repository.

legacyDirectories.instruction: If this duplicate directory reappears in a future archive, do not edit, deploy or merge from it.

sourceOfTruth.forbiddenMixing: Do not combine files from older ZIP archives or previous working folders.

currentRelease.scope: Hotfix for product-article desktop overlap and correction of Italy-map placement.

stableDecisions.menu: Web menu in Bulgarian and English; do not reintroduce a visible PDF-menu feature unless explicitly requested.

tasteJourney.mainArticle: The main focaccia article remains unchanged.
tasteJourney.landingOrder: Main focaccia story first, followed by product stories in a single vertical sequence.
tasteJourney.articleFocus: The product leads every product article; producer and region provide context.
tasteJourney.subtitlePattern: Use product-appropriate variants of the agreed format, e.g. “Произведена в Марке от Sabelli”.
tasteJourney.mapPosition: The Italy map is at the bottom of the Journey of Taste landing page.
tasteJourney.mapBehaviour: Only regions connected to used products are marked; selecting one shows only that region’s product stories.
tasteJourney.marketShareRule: Show market share only when a reliable exact claim is supported. Do not mention missing market-share data.

activeTasks: Review Version 1.1.1 after deployment on desktop and mobile.
Future optional content pass: replace remaining temporary producer images with official logo, product and production imagery when clear usage rights are available.
doNotRepeatAsNewTasks: Update the business details already stored here
Build Journey of Taste from zero
Create the existing producer articles from zero
qualityGate: Check all BG and EN routes
Check desktop, tablet and mobile layouts
Create a clean ZIP without __MACOSX, .DS_Store, node_modules or .next
